subject: Fermi GBM trigger 487974449/160618852 is not a GRB
body:
M. Stanbro (UAH) reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 487974449/160618852
at 20:27:25.80 UT on 18 June 2016, tentatively classified as a GRB,
is in fact not due to a GRB. This trigger is due to a SGR."
